source_pr.title: session: fix data race between stats loop update and bind info loop load
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #15843 

Problem Summary: The stats loop update thread has the SQL which will access the `global.bindhandle`, but the start of bind info loop load thread inits the `global.bindhandle`. That causes the data race.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: move the `LoadBindInfoLoop` before the `UpdateTableStatsLoop`.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU

symptoms: PR body: stats loop internal SQL can access global bindhandle while LoadBindInfoLoop initializes it, causing data race.
failure_signature: PR body: stats loop internal SQL can access global bindhandle while LoadBindInfoLoop initializes it, causing data race.
fix_pattern: session: fix data race between stats loop update and bind info loop load

evidence: evidence: PR body: stats loop internal SQL can access global bindhandle while LoadBindInfoLoop initializes it, causing data race.
evidence: diff moves `dom.LoadBindInfoLoop(...)` earlier in BootstrapSession with comment explaining the data race (session/session.go).
